== Notes for [[Item:Q105645|Q105645]] ==

* Wilaadat (Birth):
* Wafaat (Death):

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Muhsin_ibn_Ali
--------------------
* Wilaadat (Birth): 12 AH (633 AD)
* Wafaat (Death): 12 AH (633 AD)

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000008681870697

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
